name: Encore DBX
comment: Encore DBX is a dynamic effect fixture featuring a 5-color LED dual-lens blinder/strobe and RGB background LEDs for stunning visual effects. Powered by two 150W RGBAW LEDs, it offers flexible control, variable white color temperatures, and rugged IP65-rated durability.
